case_title: CORNEJO, RUBEN vs. RAMIREZ, DAVID IND. & DBA OPP'S PAINTING SERVICE

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORNEJO, RUBEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, DAVID IND. & DBA OPP'S PAINTING SERVICE $367.89 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $447.89
